theme: Nova CI/CD pipeline broken blocking all deployments plus Vertex enterprise contract negotiation at risk due to pricing pushback

events.text: CI/CD pipeline completely blocked — all PRs showing build failed since 13:42, no deployments possible
NOVA-1101 Critical — CI/CD pipeline broken since 13:42, 14 PRs queued, zero deployments possible
Engineering: GitHub Actions runner out of disk space — runner at 100%, build cache not cleared in 23 days
test: check GitHub Actions runner disk usage — identify largest cache directories
Infra: runner disk 100% used — node_modules cache alone is 18GB, Docker layer cache 22GB, total 47GB on 50GB runner
NOVA-1102 — runner disk full: node_modules cache 18GB, Docker 22GB, total 47GB of 50GB
fix: clear stale build cache — purging node_modules cache older than 7 days and all Docker layers older than 14 days
Cache purge running — estimated 8 minutes to clear 40GB of stale cache
